graded_findings.rationale: The gather finding says this new design spec was updated appropriately and contains the expected command behavior, registration, and test intent. That is not an adherence gap.
The gather finding says this implementation plan tracks the relevant files, tests, and verification. That is not a merge-blocking documentation problem.
The operator-facing dscli reference is missing the new dscli logs command and its -w/-n options. That leaves user-visible command documentation incomplete for a code change adding CLI behavior.
